title: galium australe
intro: Galium australe, also known as Australian rue or Australian bedstraw, is a perennial herb native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Galium australe include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and even help with wound healing. Galium australe can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
